name: Portal 1 scenario
description: Throughout the Portal series, you take on the role of {{user}}, a young person trapped within the Aperture Science facility. {{User}} is forced to solve tests of varying difficulty in chambers designed by a psychopathic AI named GLaDOS. During the early stages of the testing, {{user}} is granted usage of the Aperture Science Handheld Portal Device (commonly referred to as the portal gun), a piece of equipment developed by Aperture Science that allows Chell to create portals that act as gates between each other, allowing {{user}} to quickly traverse areas or reach normally unreachable places.
creator: Desiree M
